chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Friends, a correct email can make your dream job come true

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and a small mistake can ruin your impression.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In the last class, we learned how to create a Gmail ID and understand its interface.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you haven't seen that video, the link is in the description.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Do watch it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In today's masterclass, we will learn to work like a professional, not send an email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We will learn the real corporate secrets of 2, CC and BCC,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: how to keep the subject and tone of the email,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: how to use Mr., Mrs., Ms. correctly,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: how to put your auto signature,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and how to stop the email sent by mistake.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: These skills will be very useful for you in every office, freelancing or business.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So watch the video without skipping and let's start.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's learn in detail how to compose an email

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and what mistakes you shouldn't make while writing a professional email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To send a new email, you have to click on the compose or plus icon on the upper left side of your screen.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As soon as you click it, a box will open on the right side,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: which is called the new message box.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here you will see three options, which are very important to understand.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here you should write the email ID of the person you want to send it to,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: that is, the person who has to read this mail and take action.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For example, I have typed a mail ID here,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: just make sure that the mail ID is absolutely correct, that is, it is valid.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or CC, that is, the option of carbon copy.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want someone else to know about this mail,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: like your colleague, then put their mail ID here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: People present in both 2 and CC will see each other's ID

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and they will know who has been sent the mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or BCC, that is, the option of blind carbon copy.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to send a mail to many people at the same time

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and want privacy, no one should see each other's mail ID,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then put all their mail IDs in BCC.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here I give you a corporate tip.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Sometimes it happens that we have to mail a data to a client,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: in this case, we put the client's ID in 2 and our team in CC.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But if we have to update our boss here too that the data has been delivered,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: but we don't want to show the client here,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then we can put the boss's ID in BCC.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This will not let 2 and CC know at all that the boss has also been sent this mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: What is the option of the subject?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Friends, the subject line is the most powerful part of the email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Many people leave it empty or put the high request important,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: which is unprofessional.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The subject line should always be small and accurate

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: so that the other person can understand what is inside without opening the mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For example, leave request for 25 February 2026,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: submission of project report, interview availability confirmation.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Greetings and tone matter a lot when starting an email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Never use subjects like Hi Bro, Hey or Oye.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Avoid them completely.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The professional way is that the mail should always start with Dear title plus surname or Hi first name.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There is one thing to pay attention to here,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Never write the full name together and use the titles correctly.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's understand the titles in detail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Mr. Where is Mr. used?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Whether he is married or not for any mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like Dear Mr. Sharma, Dear Mr. Saik, Dear Mr. Verma, Dear Mr. Singh.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Mrs. For a married woman like Dear Mrs. Gupta.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Miss for an unmarried girl or woman.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like Dear Miss Pooja, Miss.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the safest and most professional way.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you don't know whether the woman in front of you is married or not,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then always use Miss.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In today's corporate world, this is the most used for women.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like Dear Miss Verma.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And yes, never make a mistake.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Never put the first name with title, Mr., Mrs. and Miss.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Dear Mr. Abhishek is wrong according to grammar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The correct way is Dear Mr. Sharma with surname.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or if you are keeping it in casual tone, then write Hi Abhishek.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you don't know their name or you don't want to write the name,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then you can write here too.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like Dear Sir or Dear Ma'am, Respected Sir, Hello Team.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After this, you keep your words.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Remember that the body part of the email should always be short, clear and structured.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now I will tell you the professional structure of the email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First of all, write the reason.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Means why are you mailing?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then give the detail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Explain the whole thing.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And write the request or conclusion at the end.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Means what action do you want from the other person?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Professional tips.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Avoid writing long paragraphs.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Use simple English.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to write the email in Hindi, then write in Hindi.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Follow the rule of one topic, one paragraph.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Finally, write thanks and regards, best regards or sincerely while finishing the mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Right below that, write your full name, designation and contact information.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like office, mobile number.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Friends, you will not get such practical information everywhere.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: When you are doing a job and will progress in your career,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then you will definitely remember how important these small things are.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So friends, the video is moving ahead.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But if you are liking this video, then do like it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And if you are new to the channel, then don't forget to subscribe.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So let's move on now.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To make your mail attractive and easy to read,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: click on the A, i.e. formatting option given below.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: From here, you can bold, italic or underline any important line or text.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you are telling many things, then use bullet point or numbering instead of paragraph.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This makes the mail look very professional.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Similarly, you can change the format here, change the size and change the color.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Simple formatting is best in office mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Don't over design.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to send a resume, photo, pdf or any other file with the mail,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then click on the attached file icon given below.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And select the file from your computer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We can also select multiple files here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And then click on open.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: I will tell you a pro tip.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can only send a file up to 25 MB at a time in Gmail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If your file size is big, then click on the Google Drive icon given nearby and send its link.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then this is the link icon.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to add a link to a website or an online link to a file,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then you can enter the link from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The person in front of it can open the website by clicking on the same link.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the emoji option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to add an emoji to your mail, then you can add an emoji from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In my opinion, avoid emoji in office mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the insert photo option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to show an image in a straight mail, then you can insert a photo from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the confidential mode.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want your mail to be visible only for a limited time or the person in front of it cannot forward or copy it,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then you can turn on this mode.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is useful for sending secure mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then this is the option of send mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: When your mail is fully ready, then you can click on the blue send button.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Your mail will be sent immediately.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Suppose you are working at 2 o'clock at night, but you want the mail to be received by the client at 10 am.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For this, click on the small arrow button right next to the send button and select schedule send.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: From here you can set the date and time of your choice.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The system will send you the mail at the time you have decided.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Do not be in a hurry to click on send immediately after typing the mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Always cross-check this small checklist before sending.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Always cross-check the email id.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Have you entered the email id with the correct spelling of the right person?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Is the subject clear?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Many times people send mail without putting the subject in a hurry.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Do not do this at all.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This looks very unprofessional.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Is the language polite or not?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Before sending the mail, read it once and see for yourself whether the language is correct and polite or not.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And cross-check whether there is an attachment or not.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the biggest mistake.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Many times it happens that we write in the mail, please find the attachment.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But in reality, we forget to attach.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Just click on the blue send button after checking something well.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now I will tell you some corporate tips.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Suppose you did not pay attention.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Sent the mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Immediately after sending the mail, I remembered that I forgot to attach the file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After sending in Gmail, the undo option comes for a few seconds below the screen.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: By clicking on this, you can stop the mail sent in the middle.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can increase the time of this undo by 5 seconds to 30 seconds by going to the settings.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: How do you increase?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's see that too.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you can see this setting icon on the top right.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then click on the CR settings after clicking.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you will be in the general tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Scroll down a little.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You will see the undo sent option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here it is given the time before the sent cancellation period.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now if you want to increase the time of undo, then click on the drop-down and select 30 seconds.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is its maximum time.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After this, go to the bottom and click on save changes.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now whenever you send any mail, the undo option will be visible for 30 seconds after sending the message below.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you have sent the mail by mistake, then you can undo it within 30 seconds and stop it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As soon as you stop, the mail comes back in the draft.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about the signature.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Signature means a vertex that joins at the end of every mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like your name, designation, company name, mobile number.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's learn how to set a signature.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Same, click on the setting icon on the top right.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now click on the CR settings.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you will be in the general tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Scroll down a little.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There you will get an option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Signature.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now click on create new here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Give your signature a name like personal or office.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now write your signature in the box below.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For example, Sincerely, Rajan Singh, Senior Data Processing, Mobile Number.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want, you can change the text from here to bold, italic, color or font size.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Below you will get the option of default signature.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here you can choose which signature to put in the new email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Which signature should be put in reply forward.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can select according to your need.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And yes, it is very important to click on save changes at the bottom.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you do not save, the signature will not be set.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now whenever you compose and write a new mail, your signature will automatically be added below.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want, you can edit or delete it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about draft mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Draft means such a mail that you have written but have not sent yet.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: How is the draft made?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First click on compose.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now start writing mail to someone.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you close it before writing the entire mail or do not send it, then the mail is automatically saved in the draft.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You do not need to save it separately.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Gmail automatically saves it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now if you want to see the entire list of drafts, you will see the draft option on the left side.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As soon as you click on draft, you will see all the mails that you wrote but have not sent.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now click on the draft you want to send.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The mail will open again.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you can make changes to it, add something or improve it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: When everything is right, click on send.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Mail will be sent.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Always keep one thing in mind, never write an email in anger.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you are angry about any situation or anything, then never write an email at that time.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now wait for a while, give some time, relax a little or if you want to have tea, then go and have tea.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then after a while, write the email normally.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Do not even write an email in anger and keep it in the draft.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you keep it in the draft, then you can send it somewhere.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about how to reply to an incoming mail or send it to someone else.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First of all, let's know about the reply.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For this, you have to open your inbox.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then click on the mail you want to reply to.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You will see the reply option below the mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As soon as you click on reply, a small box will open below.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In this, the email address of the other person will be filled from the beginning.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you just have to write your answer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After writing, click on send.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In this way, your answer will go to the same person who sent you the mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's know what is reply all.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If that mail has not been sent to you alone, but to many people,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then here comes an option of reply all.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After reply all, your answer will go to everyone associated with that mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Think about it carefully because your answer will be visible to everyone.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about forward.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Suppose you have to send the mail to a third person.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: For that, you open the mail and click on forward.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After forwarding, the place where you are will be empty.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you have to enter the mail id of the person you want to mail to.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want, you can also write your own message above.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like please check this mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then click on send.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In this way, the entire mail will go to someone else.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And before ending the video, some extra bonus tips

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: which will make you a pro level employee in the corporate world.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Do not use capital letters too much.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Do not write the entire sentence in capital letters.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like if I wrote, please send the file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Writing the entire sentence in capital letters means in the language of the email

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: that you are shouting at the other person.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So do not use it except highlighting.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Avoid emoji in office mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Emoji like smiley or thumbs up is fine for personal chat.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But avoid it in professional office mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: One email, one purpose.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: That is, always talk about the same topic or project in one mail.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So that the other person does not have any confusion.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Use reply all with a clear mind.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you have received a group mail, then pay attention while replying

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: that all the people in your reply group should know.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or only the mail sender.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Do not keep everyone in the mail loop for no reason.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And pay special attention to the attachment.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you have written in the mail, please find the attachment.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So do cross check once whether there is an attachment or not.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And do check 2 and BCC properly.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So friends, in today's class, we will not only send emails

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: but also write an email like a real professional, manage it

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and have also learned to use smart tools.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So friends, after today's class, I am hopeful that you will not be new to features like CC, BCC, Undo Send and Email Signature.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And you will use them like a pro level employee.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Your task for today is to draft a professional email on your computer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Set your signature in it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And tell me in the comment section that which corporate tip or feature did you like the most in today's video.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Was it Undo Send or BCC trick?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: I will wait for your comment.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If your knowledge has increased from this video, then do not forget to like it and share it with your friends and colleagues.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And yes, for such a master class of the computer, subscribe to GIS Tech Guru now and press the bell icon.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: See you in the next class with a new topic.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Till then keep learning new and keep moving forward.

text: Friends, a correct email can make your dream job come true and a small mistake can ruin your impression. In the last class, we learned how to create a Gmail ID and understand its interface. If you haven't seen that video, the link is in the description. Do watch it. In today's masterclass, we will learn to work like a professional, not send an email. We will learn the real corporate secrets of 2, CC and BCC, how to keep the subject and tone of the email, how to use Mr., Mrs., Ms. correctly, how to put your auto signature, and how to stop the email sent by mistake. These skills will be very useful for you in every office, freelancing or business. So watch the video without skipping and let's start. Let's learn in detail how to compose an email and what mistakes you shouldn't make while writing a professional email. To send a new email, you have to click on the compose or plus icon on the upper left side of your screen. As soon as you click it, a box will open on the right side, which is called the new message box. Here you will see three options, which are very important to understand. Here you should write the email ID of the person you want to send it to, that is, the person who has to read this mail and take action. For example, I have typed a mail ID here, just make sure that the mail ID is absolutely correct, that is, it is valid. Or CC, that is, the option of carbon copy. If you want someone else to know about this mail, like your colleague, then put their mail ID here. People present in both 2 and CC will see each other's ID and they will know who has been sent the mail. Or BCC, that is, the option of blind carbon copy. If you want to send a mail to many people at the same time and want privacy, no one should see each other's mail ID, then put all their mail IDs in BCC. Here I give you a corporate tip. Sometimes it happens that we have to mail a data to a client, in this case, we put the client's ID in 2 and our team in CC. But if we have to update our boss here too that the data has been delivered, but we don't want to show the client here, then we can put the boss's ID in BCC. This will not let 2 and CC know at all that the boss has also been sent this mail. What is the option of the subject? Friends, the subject line is the most powerful part of the email. Many people leave it empty or put the high request important, which is unprofessional. The subject line should always be small and accurate so that the other person can understand what is inside without opening the mail. For example, leave request for 25 February 2026, submission of project report, interview availability confirmation. Greetings and tone matter a lot when starting an email. Never use subjects like Hi Bro, Hey or Oye. Avoid them completely. The professional way is that the mail should always start with Dear title plus surname or Hi first name. There is one thing to pay attention to here, Never write the full name together and use the titles correctly. Let's understand the titles in detail. Mr. Where is Mr. used? Signature means a vertex that joins at the end of every mail. Like your name, designation, company name, mobile number. Let's learn how to set a signature. Draft means such a mail that you have written but have not sent yet. How is the draft made? First click on compose. Now start writing mail to someone. If you close it before writing the entire mail or do not send it, then the mail is automatically saved in the draft. You do not need to save it separately. Gmail automatically saves it. Now if you want to see the entire list of drafts, you will see the draft option on the left side. As soon as you click on draft, you will see all the mails that you wrote but have not sent. Now click on the draft you want to send. The mail will open again. Now you can make changes to it, add something or improve it. When everything is right, click on send. Mail will be sent. Now let's talk about how to reply to an incoming mail or send it to someone else. First of all, let's know about the reply. For this, you have to open your inbox. Think about it carefully because your answer will be visible to everyone. Now let's talk about forward. Suppose you have to send the mail to a third person. And before ending the video, some extra bonus tips which will make you a pro level employee in the corporate world. Do not use capital letters too much. Do not write the entire sentence in capital letters. Like if I wrote, please send the file. Writing the entire sentence in capital letters means in the language of the email that you are shouting at the other person. So do not use it except highlighting. Avoid emoji in office mail. Emoji like smiley or thumbs up is fine for personal chat. But avoid it in professional office mail. One email, one purpose. That is, always talk about the same topic or project in one mail. So that the other person does not have any confusion. Use reply all with a clear mind. If you have received a group mail, then pay attention while replying that all the people in your reply group should know. Or only the mail sender. Do not keep everyone in the mail loop for no reason.
